summary: Completed backend + frontend regression testing for security/hook/QS enhancements. Backend APIs and major UI integrations passed, but formula engine valid-expression evaluation is failing (returns 0), while unsafe expression blocking works.

ui_bugs.issue: Valid formulas are not producing non-zero quantities/amounts in tested row path; safe and unsafe formulas both resulted in ₹0.

integration_issues.issue: Unit test confirms evaluateFormula('length*width*height', valid dimensions) returns 0 unexpectedly; unsafe expression correctly returns 0.

action_items: Fix evaluateFormula valid expression path in /app/frontend/src/utils/qsFormulaEngine.js (currently returning 0 for normal formula).
After formula fix, retest measurement row recalculation in QS UI and re-run qsFormulaEngine.test.js.
Optional maintainability: split large files (/app/frontend/src/pages/QSEstimatorPage.jsx and /app/backend/server.py).
critical_code_review_comments: Critical functional regression: valid formula evaluation appears broken while unsafe block remains active.
Chat session persistence with sessionStorage is working in UI reload flow.
Drawing analyzer end-to-end upload/analyze/results rendering is working.
No MOCKED APIs used in this run.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST Regression Project via UI and TEST_QS_* style API records during run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend targeted pytest run passed 6/6 on public URL env. Frontend flows passed for Local Market Rates, Drawing Analyzer, chat persistence, comparison/weather/export. Formula behavior is the only blocker and is reproducible via unit test (2 failing assertions).
rca of the issue: Repro: run `yarn test --watchAll=false --runTestsByPath src/utils/qsFormulaEngine.test.js`. Result: valid formula tests fail with received 0; unsafe formula test passes. UI row attempts also showed safe/unsafe both ₹0, matching unit-level signal. Likely root cause is inside formula parser/variable validation path in evaluateFormula (normal expression rejected or evaluated to 0).
